Text: Honmaru's best friend.[NL]A dropout wizard who[NL]helps him with items.[3F]

Honmaru transformed[NL]into a girl.[NL]Tsutomu likes her.[3F]
Taruruuto's beautiful[NL]older sister. Her magic[NL]lasts 10 entire days.[3F]

Self-proclaimed rival.[NL]Likes Mimora and tries[NL]to trap Taru but fails.[3F]
Honmaru's dad. Trained[NL]in martial arts in his[NL]youth. Author of books.[3F]
Honmaru's kind mother.[NL]A mature person who[NL]accepts everything.[3F]

Iyona's pretty mother.[NL]Looks forward to her[NL]growing up beautifully.[3F]
Best takoyaki chef. Too[NL]good-natured and weak to[NL]kids. Loves Ooya.[3F]
